title: Apple Intel Chip Pact Adds New Angle To Supply Chain Story
title_en: Apple Intel Chip Pact Adds New Angle To Supply Chain Story
summary: Apple and Intel have reached a preliminary chip manufacturing agreement that would shift part of Apple's processor production to Intel facilities. title: 苹果 iPadOS 17.7.11 正式版发布，修复通知服务故障
